nodes.title: Reginald is such a misunderstood marshmallow care bear
nodes.full_text:
He just wants everything to be a little sugary
The legend tells that he still to this day 
Collects broken marshmallows from the war, 
And hands them out as sprinkles on ice cream 
For people who need an extra smile in their day

nodes.title: At one point, Reginald had to make a choice
nodes.full_text:
To genocide everyone he had ever loved
Because they had taken up annihilating mankind
So it was either to watch everyone die
Or end the war and forever be considered the only remaining evil
From a war he did not fight.

nodes.title: But it wasnt until after he won the war
nodes.full_text:
That he looked around and saw that even though he had become a mighty champion
And saved mother Earth from destruction
He no longer had other marshmallows to play with
And this made Reginald sad

nodes.title: But reginald knew what he had to do
nodes.full_text: He stepped up, and fought both cthulu and the robot armies

nodes.title: So the people sent an army to fight marshmallow cthulu
nodes.full_text:
Which caused even greater destruction.

Many battles between the armies and marshmallows were fought

This led to the actual apocalypse arriving 
And civilization as we knew ended

nodes.title: Marshmallow Cthulu had started attacking all the cities
nodes.full_text:
All the people were afraid, and their homes being destroyed

And Marshmallow God was away on business.

nodes.title: Yes It's a sad marshmallow care bear
